channel.title: web-client on Zellij
channel.description: Recent content in web-client on Zellij

item.title: Zellij 0.43.0: web client, multiple pane actions, compact-bar tooltips
item.description: var playerElement = document.getElementById("player-wrapper"); var player = new Clappr.Player({ source: "/video/web-client-intro.mp4", mute: false, height: 540, width: 960 }); player.attachTo(playerElement); Zellij 0.43.0 has just been released! Check it out! Some highlights: Web Client Multiple Select Key Tooltips Stack Pane Keybinding New Rust Plugin APIs Performance Improvements Please Support the Zellij Developer ❤️ Web Client Zellij was never meant to live exclusively in your terminal, and this release brings it to the browser.
